title: Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Rehabilitation and Construction of Trunk Road Bridges Package 1, Tanga-Horohoro Road) (Konoike Construction Co. Ltd.) Order, 2002
title_en: Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Rehabilitation and Construction of Trunk Road Bridges Package 1, Tanga-Horohoro Road) (Konoike Construction Co. Ltd.) Order, 2002

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as The Excise Tariff (Exemption)(Rehabilitation and Construction of Trunk Road Bridges Package 1, Tanga-Horohoro Road)(Konoike Construction Co. Ltd.) Order, 2002 and shall be deemed to have'come into operation on the first day of June, 2002.

provisions.title: Excise duty exemption
provisions.content: Subject to the conditions specified in paragraph 3 of this Order, the whole of the excise payable on the fiiel, oil and lubricants specified in the Schedule to this Order imported or purchased prior to clearance through customs by or on behalf of Konoike Construction Co. Ltd to be used solely in the implementation of the Rehabilitation and Construction of Trunk Road Bridges Package 1, Tanga-Horohoro Road Project is hereby exempted.

provisions.title: Condition for exemption
provisions.content: The exemption granted under this Order shall cease to have effect and the excise duty shall become due and be payable as if this Order had not been made if the said fuel or oil or lubricants are used for other purposes, or are transferred, sold or disposed of in any way to another person not entitled to enjoy similar privileges as are conferred under this Order. Schedule S. No. Description Unit Quantity 1. Diesel Litre 1,800,000 2. Petrol Litre 18,000 3. Lubricant Drum 90 4.
